meta.title: America's first F-47 STEALTH FIGHTER begins production
meta.description:
According to Air Force Chief of Staff Gen. David Allvin, Boeing has officially begun production on the first new F-47 sixth-generation air superiority fighter, with plans to have it airborne in 2028. 

📱 Follow Sandboxx News on social
Twitter: https://twitter.com/sandboxxnews
Instagram: https://instagram.com/sandboxxnews
